summary: The diff implements REQ-10 by adding a BackgroundDecorations component with animated blobs, floating particles, geometric grid overlay, diagonal mesh lines, and a top-edge glow line. All acceptance criteria appear to be satisfied: 8 particle orbs with CSS drift animations, 4 radial gradient blob shapes at corners/edges, a geometric grid overlay, pointer-events disabled so interactions are unaffected, and the component is rendered as a fixed z-index:0 layer behind all content.
